template.name: sweep_aggregate_fbo_to_pbx
template.description: UC6 Step 1: Creates expected movements of cash between Master FBO and a destination program bank at aggregate level. Bidirectional: supports sweep from FBO to PBX or PBX to FBO. Credit sweep source clearing and debit sweep destination clearing on the economic ledger.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification: sweep destination clearing debited, sweep source clearing credited. Net zero.

template.trigger: Sweep job identifies required movement between Master FBO and a destination program bank.

ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where aggregate clearing positions are created for the sweep source and destination.

accounting_treatments.description: Create expected clearing positions for inter-bank sweep at aggregate level.

account_code_validations.description: Sweep source clearing asset; credited to reflect expected outbound cash movement.
Sweep destination clearing asset; debited to reflect expected inbound cash movement.

customer_count.description: Number of customers included in this sweep batch.

run_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the sweep run was initiated.

sweep_batch_id.description: Unique identifier for the sweep batch.

validations.description: Sweep source and destination clearing accounts must use different account codes.
validations.name: distinct_clearing_codes

legs.description: Stage expected inter-bank cash movement: destination expects inbound (debit), source expects outbound (credit).

examples.name: net_sweep_50k_fbo_to_pbx
examples.description: Net $50,000 FDIC sweep from Master FBO to a destination program bank.
